package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for servefile_via_readfile_then_c_data: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that load files into memory and then write them through gin.Context.Data(...) instead of using file helpers or streaming.
type CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataModel
}

type CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataService struct {
    repo *CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServefileViaReadfileThenCData(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServefileViaReadfileThenCDataDTO) error {
    focus := "servefile_via_readfile_then_c"
    _ = focus
    templateCache := map[string]string{"page": "parsed at startup"}
    _ = templateCache
    servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative := map[string]int{"servefile": 1, "readfile": 2, "then": 3, "c": 4, "data": 5}
    servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    servefile_negative_0 := servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative["servefile"] + len(input)
    _ = servefile_negative_0
    readfile_negative_1 := servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative["readfile"] + len(input)
    _ = readfile_negative_1
    then_negative_2 := servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_negative_2
    c_negative_3 := servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative["c"] + len(input)
    _ = c_negative_3
    data_negative_4 := servefile_readfile_then_c_data_negative["data"] + len(input)
    _ = data_negative_4
    return nil
}
